title: மின்மினி — Minminni (Fireflies) — EP02 Short

body.text: text with [audio_tags] and... pauses and EMPHASIS

scenes.speaker: Arjun
scenes.visual_note: Arjun running through courtyard at dusk, arms wide, calling friends

scenes.speaker: Arjun
scenes.visual_note: First fireflies appear. Arjun's eyes wide, pointing off-screen

scenes.speaker: Kaavya
scenes.english_gloss: Catch them! I'm coming too! Run, run!
scenes.visual_note: Kaavya joins excitement, taking charge. All three kids running

scenes.speaker: Arjun
scenes.tamil_text_raw: Pudinga, pudinga! Bottle-la podunga! Paaru, evvalavu iruku!
scenes.tamil_text_enhanced: [mischievously] Pudinga, pudinga! Bottle-la podunga! [curious] Paaru... EVVALAVU iruku!
scenes.english_gloss: Wait, wait! Put them in a bottle! Look how many there are!
scenes.visual_note: Jar with 8-10 glowing fireflies. Kids' faces lit by jar light

scenes.speaker: Kaavya
scenes.tamil_text_raw: Arjun... paaru. Bottle-la potathuku apram, minminni poochiyoda velicham konjam, konjama koraiyithu!
scenes.tamil_text_enhanced: [thoughtful] Arjun... [sighs] paaru. Bottle-la potathuku apram... minminni poochiyoda velicham konjam... konjama koraiyithu.
scenes.english_gloss: Arjun... look. Since we put them in the bottle, the fireflies' light is getting dimmer and dimmer.
scenes.pause_markers: ... after 'apram' (pause as she notices) / ... after 'konjam' (building sadness)
scenes.visual_note: Jar glow noticeably dimmer. Kaavya holds it, looking concerned

scenes.speaker: Kaavya
scenes.tamil_text_raw: Antha poochigaluku bottle-ulla adaipattu irukrathu pidikala. Velila vitralama?
scenes.tamil_text_enhanced: [gently] Antha poochigaluku bottle-ulla adaipattu irukrathu... pidikala. [hopeful] Velila vitralama?
scenes.english_gloss: Those little lights don't like being trapped in the bottle. Should we let them go?
scenes.pause_markers: ... after 'irukrathu' (pause before saying it's not good)
scenes.visual_note: Kaavya holds jar to chest, looking at Arjun with pleading eyes

scenes.speaker: Kaavya
scenes.visual_note: Slow motion. Jar tips, fireflies spiral upward. Yard lights up

scenes.speaker: Meenu
scenes.tamil_text_raw: Paaru, Kaavya akka... romba azhagaa irukku.
scenes.tamil_text_enhanced: [softly amazed] Paaru, Kaavya akka... [sighs with awe] romba AZHAGAA irukku.
scenes.english_gloss: Look, Kaavya sister... it's so beautiful.
scenes.pause_markers: ... after 'akka' (pause of awe before final revelation)
scenes.visual_note: Entire yard filled with fireflies. Three kids looking up. Paati smiling from porch

voice_settings_note: ElevenLabs v3 requires EMPTY voice_settings: {}. No stability, no speed, no style. Everything controlled via text tags and punctuation.

dialogue_summary.scene_8: [softly amazed] Paaru, Kaavya akka... [sighs with awe] romba AZHAGAA irukku.
